final:
module top_module(
    input obf_A,
    input B,
    input Cin,
    input En,
    output reg Sum,
    output reg Cout
);always @(obf_A or B or Cin or En) begin
    if (En == 1'b1) begin
        Sum  <= obf_A ^ B ^ Cin;
        Cout <= (obf_A & B) | (Cin & (obf_A ^ B));
    end else begin
        Sum  <= 1'b0;
        Cout <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
